title: Phishing Detection Dashboard
description: Python/Flask dashboard that scores URLs and emails, surfacing remediation guidance alongside SOC incident response playbooks.

title: Network Forensics Toolkit
description: CLI utilities focused on packet triage, IOC enrichment, and automated incident reporting for SOC analysts.

title: Rechiro: Fisher-to-Buyer Platform
description: Low-code prototype showcased at the Huawei Siaya Hackathon and Enactus National Expo, enabling fishermen to share fresh catch data and coordinate with verified buyers.

title: SOC Alert Triage Playbooks
description: Documented SOC L1/L2 triage flows from TryHackMe labs plus Cyber Chief Circle practice, consolidating indicators, automation rules, and escalation steps.
